profile.name: Dr. Shannon Saszik
profile.title: Associate Professor of Psychology & Department Chair

research.description: We combine in vivo electroretinography, behavioral assays, and molecular approaches to understand retinal development and plasticity in zebrafish. Current work focuses on how early environmental exposures light, stress, and ethanol reshape visual circuits across development, with translational implications for fetal alcohol spectrum disorders and visual system pathology.
activeProjects: Developmental ERG Profiling across larval to adult life stages
Ethanol exposure effects on retinal circuits and FASD models
Stress, social behavior, and visual processing in adult zebrafish
